allow: PowerShell($c = Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.Source } else { "not on PATH" }; foreach \($p in @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\node.exe", "${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\nodejs\\node.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\node.exe", "$env:APPDATA\\npm\\node.exe"\)\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { "FOUND: $p" } })

PowerShell($paths = @\("C:\\Program Files\\nodejs","C:\\nodejs","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs"\) ; Get-ChildItem -Path C:\\ -Filter node.exe -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Depth 4 | Select-Object -First 5 -ExpandProperty FullName ; "done")
PowerShell($node = "C:\\Program Files\\Adobe\\Adobe Creative Cloud Experience\\libs\\node.exe"; & $node --check "api/data-store/index.js"; if \($?\) { "data-store OK" })

PowerShell($node = "C:\\Program Files\\Adobe\\Adobe Creative Cloud Experience\\libs\\node.exe"; & $node --check "api/activity-log/index.js"; if \($?\) { "activity-log OK" }; Get-Content "api/activity-log/function.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; if \($?\) { "function.json valid" })
PowerShell($env:PATH = "C:\\Program Files\\Adobe\\Adobe Creative Cloud Experience\\libs;" + $env:PATH; "node = " + \(Get-Command node\).Source; "--- preflight ---"; node scripts/preflight.js)

PowerShell($env:PATH = "C:\\Program Files\\Adobe\\Adobe Creative Cloud Experience\\libs;" + $env:PATH; "--- bn-core parity test ---"; node scripts/test-bn-core.js; "--- api syntax ---"; node --check api/data-store/index.js; if\($?\){"data-store OK"}; node --check api/activity-log/index.js; if\($?\){"activity-log OK"}; node --check api/get-roles/index.js; if\($?\){"get-roles OK"})
